# Aggregate L3 Interface with IPv4 Address
-- interfaces/eth1-3 --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Interface
metadata:
  name: eth1-3
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  name: eth1/3
  description: Member of po20
  adminState: Up
  type: Physical
  mtu: 9216
-- interfaces/po20 --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Interface
metadata:
  name: po20
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  name: po20
  description: L3 Port-Channel
  adminState: Up
  type: Aggregate
  mtu: 9216
  ipv4:
    addresses:
      - 10.0.100.0/31
  aggregation:
    controlProtocol:
      mode: Active
    memberInterfaceRefs:
      - name: eth1-3
-- state --
{
  "openconfig-interfaces:interfaces": {
    "interface": [
      {
        "name": "eth1/3",
        "config": {
          "description": "Member of po20",
          "enabled": true,
          "mtu": 9216,
          "name": "eth1/3",
          "type": "iana-if-type:ethernetCsmacd"
        },
        "openconfig-if-ethernet:ethernet": {
          "config": {
            "openconfig-if-aggregate:aggregate-id": "po20"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "po20",
        "config": {
          "description": "L3 Port-Channel",
          "enabled": true,
          "mtu": 9216,
          "name": "po20",
          "type": "iana-if-type:ieee8023adLag"
        },
        "openconfig-if-aggregate:aggregation": {
          "config": {
            "lag-type": "LACP"
          }
        },
        "subinterfaces": {
          "subinterface": [
            {
              "config": {
                "enabled": true,
                "index": 0
              },
              "index": 0,
              "openconfig-if-ip:ipv4": {
                "addresses": {
                  "address": [
                    {
                      "config": {
                        "ip": "10.0.100.0",
                        "prefix-length": 31,
                        "type": "PRIMARY"
                      },
                      "ip": "10.0.100.0"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "config": {
                  "enabled": true
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
